name: cryptohybrid-bank
description: CryptoHybrid Bank - Comprehensive crypto-fiat banking platform

scripts.dev:services: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix services/api-gateway" "npm run dev --prefix services/user-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/wallet-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/payment-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/card-service"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:services
scripts.build:services: npm run build --prefix services/api-gateway && npm run build --prefix services/user-service && npm run build --prefix services/wallet-service && npm run build --prefix services/payment-service && npm run build --prefix services/card-service
scripts.test: npm run test:services && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:services: npm run test --prefix services/api-gateway --if-present && npm run test --prefix services/user-service --if-present && npm run test --prefix services/wallet-service --if-present && npm run test --prefix services/payment-service --if-present && npm run test --prefix services/card-service --if-present
scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix services/api-gateway && npm install --prefix services/user-service && npm install --prefix services/wallet-service && npm install --prefix services/payment-service && npm install --prefix services/card-service && npm install --prefix mock-backend

author: CryptoHybrid Bank Team
